meaning: adj.无关紧要的,可忽略的,无意义的
examples: In 1949 Bonn was a small, insignificant city.
The levels of chemicals in the river are not insignificant.
Our boss dislikes being overburdened with insignificant detail.
How dare they say as they do, this was a very small insignificant amount of Mercury.
There are some insignificant differences, though more in emphasis and intent, than in real effect.
